Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Dross]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 6''' — Dross is a construct that identifies as the Keeper of the Dream Well.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 6''' — Dross is a guide-construct built near the Dream Well.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 6''' — Dross was previously referred to by names such as garbage, defect, junk, chaff, waste, failure, dregs, slag, scum, refuse, and dross.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 6''' — Dross is a construct that gained the ability to think and combine words in new ways after falling into the Dream Well.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 6''' — Dross is a memory construct.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 6''' — Dross is a rusted metal ball.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 6''' — Dross uses dream madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 6''' — Dross is capable of being bound to a gem like an original construct.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 8''' — Dross is a living construct.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 8''' — Dross's form is a purple cloud filled with violet sparks.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 8''' — After being merged with the sapphire, Dross's form becomes a defined orb containing an interlocking mechanism of gears.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 8''' — Dross has two cores.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 8''' — Dross gained senses like a Jade after the operation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 8''' — Dross is an Eye of the Deep.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 8''' — Dross's insides consist of a mass of phantom gears and clouds of sparks.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 8''' — Dross wants to be called Omni-codex.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 8''' — Dross refers to the pockets of air within giant bubbles as habitats.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 9''' — Dross is a floating ball of purple light.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 9''' — Dross is a gem that can flash.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 9''' — Dross is a gem that contains madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 10''' — Dross is a gem that can drift out as a cloud of shifting purple gears and swimming violet lights.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 11''' — Dross is a construct that can lose memories as he decays.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 12''' — Dross emits a purple light.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 12''' — Dross is a jewel/gem.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 12''' — Dross can drift as a floating purple cloud of light and phantom gears.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 13''' — Dross is a construct that has entered Lindon's pure core.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 13''' — Dross's spirit-form is an ethereal ball of turning gears and spinning violet lights.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 13''' — Dross resides inside Lindon's pure core.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 15''' — Dross believes he will qualify as a living spirit after his current stage of growth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 15''' — Dross is forming a core of his own.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 15''' — Dross has developed madra channels and a core.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 15''' — Dross resides in a gem in Lindon's pocket.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 15''' — Dross is a construct that spins inside Lindon's core.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 15''' — Dross is becoming opaque and growing skin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 15''' — Dross spent a long time in the Dream Well.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 15''' — Dross is described as looking like an advanced Remnant or a cross between a spirit and a sacred beast.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 16''' — Dross was taken by an Akura.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 16''' — Dross has traveled with Lindon for four weeks.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 16''' — Lindon intends to bring Dross back.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 18''' — Dross is a spirit that flows out of Lindon's vessel and has a round body with one eye and a mouth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 18''' — Dross is a spirit that can be drawn into Lindon's core.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 19''' — Dross can focus his eye on a person.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 2''' — Dross is a mental construct that can project words into minds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 2''' — Dross is a thought-construct that can use Lindon's senses.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 2''' — Lindon can use Dross to send intentions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 3''' — Dross can handle unimportant thoughts to increase Lindon's concentration and processing speed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 3''' — Dross can gather information on Paths and behavior to model them.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 3''' — Dross is a one-eyed spirit with pebbly purple skin and two stubby, boneless arms.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 3''' — Dross is a character in the story.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 4''' — Dross can speak directly into Lindon's thoughts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 4''' — Dross spoke up to Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 7''' — Dross is a companion of Lindon who can glow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 7''' — Dross is aware that no one in the Akura clan knows Mercy left Harmony to die.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 8''' — Dross is watching Eithan's presentation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 8''' — Dross is a spirit with a fully formed consciousness and madra system tied to Lindon's brain.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 8''' — Dross is one-eyed and purple.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 8''' — Dross is a parasite infesting Lindon's soul.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 8''' — Dross is a character who can exit Lindon's soul and hover on his shoulder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 8''' — Dross can speak.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 9''' — Dross recites a mantra about the unity of aura.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 9''' — Dross's mantra describes soulfire as vital aura distilled.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 9''' — Dross is an entity Lindon communicates with silently.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 10''' — Dross' voice interrupted Yerin's cycling meditation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 11''' — Dross has built a model of Prince Kiro's behavior.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 11''' — Dross is a spirit that smooths out Lindon's thoughts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 11''' — Dross runs on excess dream aura produced by Lindon's mind.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 11''' — Dross can provide combat solutions and predictions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 11''' — Dross requires Dream Well water.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 12''' — Dross is a spirit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 12''' — Dross is a spirit that uses Lindon's senses.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 12''' — Dross lacks a stomach or digestive system.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 14''' — Dross tried to guess his gift and trick Eithan into giving him hints during the journey.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 14''' — Dross is a spirit that can reside at the base of Lindon's skull.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 14''' — Dross has stubby purple arms.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 14''' — Dross has absorbed many information constructs from Ghostwater.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 14''' — Dross can simulate experiments in Lindon's head.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 14''' — Dross can make weapons if he has blueprints.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 15''' — Dross is a character who communicates with Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 17''' — Dross informed Lindon that the cloudship's tubes were for propulsion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 17''' — Dross provides information about Little Blue's abilities.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 18''' — Dross is a purple spirit that works through Lindon's body.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 18''' — Dross can alter memories while people sleep.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 18''' — Dross can slide out of Lindon's body.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 19''' — Dross can assist a Soulsmith.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 19''' — Dross has shown Lindon the effect of a combination of techniques in a dream simulation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 20''' — Dross provides combat reports.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 20''' — Dross examined Lindon's axe with him.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 21''' — Dross has a large eye taking up most of his purple body.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 21''' — Dross can suggest using Sage's madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 22''' — Dross has gone with Lindon.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 2''' — Dross resides within Lindon's mind and spirit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 2''' — Dross enjoys games.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 3''' — Dross is a companion of Lindon who can whistle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 3''' — Dross can enhance Lindon's mind.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 4''' — Dross is a spirit created from Northstrider's Ghostwater.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 4''' — Dross can process the essence of a scale.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 4''' — Dross can simulate battles.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 5''' — Dross pointed out the Sage's owl to Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 5''' — Dross watches Lindon all the time.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 6''' — Dross provides Lindon with conversations to help him focus.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 6''' — Dross has a Pride model that was significantly improved.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 7''' — Dross created a model of Yerin for Lindon to fight.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 9''' — Dross can see why Lindon might be worried.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 9''' — Dross is capable of explaining context clues.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 11''' — Dross suggests Lindon use dragon's breath to attack the base.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 11''' — Dross suggested Lindon bribe the man in the second trial.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 12''' — Dross can play memories back for Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 13''' — Dross is an entity that Lindon uses to take notes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 13''' — Dross notes that Lindon's mother is watching.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 14''' — Dross can count the number of people present.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 14''' — Dross provides information and observations.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 14''' — Dross can provide Lindon with an edge in combat.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 15''' — Dross guides Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 15''' — Dross is a character who spoke to Lindon and called the crown an imposter.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 15''' — Lindon can train against a model of Dross.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 16''' — Dross is a mind-spirit that Lindon worries about.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 16''' — Lindon planned to figure something out with Dross.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 19''' — Dross can manifest over Lindon's shoulder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 20''' — Dross has a mental voice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 20''' — Dross guides Lindon's combat.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 20''' — Dross was exhausted after Lindon's attack.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 21''' — Dross was silent and seemed afraid.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 2''' — Dross is a mind-spirit born from Ghostwater in its last days.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 2''' — Dross is present with Lindon and reacts to the Abidan's arrival.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 2''' — Dross popped up onto Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 3''' — Lindon faced Dross after his confusion regarding Suriel's visit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 3''' — Dross can steal memories.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 3''' — Dross is not completely material.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 4''' — Dross can provide combat solutions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 6''' — Dross is an entity that can observe Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 6''' — Dross created a predictive model for Blacksword.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 7''' — Dross is a companion of Lindon who provides commentary.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 7''' — Northstrider is testing Dross to see if his initiative and ability to propose solutions are tied to his personality and self-awareness.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 7''' — Northstrider is testing Dross's capacity, resolve, and spiritual structure to see if replication is possible without waiting fifty years.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 7''' — Dross emerged from the oracle codex.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 7''' — Northstrider indicated he would come to Lindon whenever he required Dross.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 8''' — Dross suggested the gathering might be due to the position of the stars.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 8''' — Dross is someone Yerin will see again in a month.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 9''' — Lindon asked Dross for help with his Remnant arm.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 9''' — Dross finds the sacred spiders fascinating.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 10''' — Dross suggested the name Hollow Domain for Lindon's new technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 10''' — Dross can provide reminders of Lindon's fights.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 10''' — Dross comments on Lindon's appearance.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 13''' — Dross helped Lindon separate and process energies using the Heart of Twin Stars.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 13''' — Dross can use limited information to assist Lindon's perception.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 13''' — Dross can take control of Wavedancer.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 13''' — Dross can reside within Lindon's armor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 14''' — Dross can perform tests inside his mind.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 14''' — Dross is traveling with Lindon and Charity.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 14''' — Dross runs on dream aura.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 14''' — Dross can remember facts from tests and records from the tournament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 17''' — Dross completed a model of Mercy and Sophara.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 18''' — Dross believes Lindon can handle Yerin's Blood Shadow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 18''' — Dross drifts in the darkness with Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 18''' — Dross can project images onto a deck.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 23''' — Dross sorts through Lindon's memories.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 23''' — Dross helped Lindon reason through the possibility of draining madra from the Wandering Titan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 23''' — Dross is a spirit that can connect to dream tablets and memorize them.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 25''' — Dross hovered over Lindon's face.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 25''' — Dross provided an analysis of Sophara's fighting style to Ruby.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 26''' — Dross is a character who gave Yerin records of Sophara.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 26''' — Dross is a companion to Lindon who provides scenarios.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 26''' — Dross reported that Yerin won.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — Dross helped bring Northstrider's weapon together.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — Dross pointed out that it would be rude not to join the gang.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — Dross shouted a warning.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — Dross communicates with Lindon via messages.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — Dross holds onto memories.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — Dross warned Lindon that Sophara would be back up in about two seconds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 28''' — Dross told Lindon he was not an Overlord.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 3''' — Dross can return images.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 4''' — Dross can whistle in Lindon's mind.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 4''' — Dross experiences spatial travel as feeling twisty.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 5''' — Dross is left at the controls of the fortress.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 6''' — Lindon gave orders to Dross regarding the ships.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 6''' — Dross is ready.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 6''' — Dross reports that communication constructs are being passed out.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 6''' — Dross suggested Mercy keep Yerin company.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 6''' — Dross corrected Lindon's count of the Irons.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 8''' — Dross exists in a physical form.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 9''' — Dross is a character that can restrain Lindon's murderous impulses.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 9''' — Dross is trapped inside a living skull.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 9''' — Dross can soothe egos.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 9''' — Dross can manipulate light images to assign tasks.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 11''' — Dross is a spirit capable of speaking into people's minds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 11''' — Dross knows things that Lindon does not.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 12''' — Dross can contact the Golds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 12''' — Dross reports on the First Elder's technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 13''' — Dross sent a garbled transmission to Eithan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 15''' — Dross corrects Lindon's count of the Li clan members.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 15''' — Dross shouted for Lindon to look east.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 16''' — Dross can show Lindon memories of the tournament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 16''' — Dross can provide simulations.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 16''' — Dross has an eye that can swivel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 17''' — Dross is a powerful tool.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 18''' — Dross is an entity that shares memories and observations with Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 18''' — Dross panicked when Lindon looked into Suriel's marble.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 18''' — Dross points out that advancing inside the suppression field won't be an advantage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 18''' — Dross assists Lindon with targeting constructs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 19''' — Lindon asked Dross for a battle plan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 19''' — Dross gave a squeal and then covered it up with a cough.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 19''' — Dross spoke into the characters' heads.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 19''' — Dross can accelerate his perception.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 19''' — Dross can project himself into Mercy's mind.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 19''' — Dross informs Mercy that they need her to fight the Titan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 20''' — Dross delivers instructions to Lindon and others.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 20''' — Dross is a spirit that guides Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 21''' — Dross does not really die except under truly extraordinary circumstances.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 22''' — Dross exists as a loose cloud of dream madra within Lindon's soul.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 2''' — Dross is a purple mass of spiritual power at the base of Lindon's skull.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 2''' — Dross is someone Lindon wishes was present to help sort his thoughts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 3''' — Dross is an entity that Lindon needs to repair/awaken.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 4''' — Lindon wishes he had Dross to talk to.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 4''' — Dross is present with Lindon, though currently unconscious.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 4''' — Dross is someone Lindon believes would love the spiritual space inside Mercy's book.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 4''' — Dross is gone.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 6''' — Dross is a character Lindon thinks about.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 7''' — Dross is a memory spirit composed of many minds and spirits.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 7''' — Dross's form can be manifested as a spinning purple ball of madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 7''' — Dross's internal structure consists of organic rings and madra channels.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 7''' — Lindon needs to fix Dross.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 9''' — Dross is more stable than he has been in a long time.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 9''' — Dross is a purple blob that has become a pale and washed-out gray color.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 9''' — Dross's current personality is a dry and passionless recital of words.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 9''' — Dross's physical form consists of one large eye, one mouth with sharp teeth, and two boneless pseudopod arms.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 10''' — Dross pointed out that the Sword Sage made it out of the labyrinth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 10''' — Dross states the foundation of the facility predates the founding of the Arelius line by several centuries.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 11''' — Dross logs weaknesses for future reference.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 11''' — Dross warns that madra or soulfire expended in battle is difficult to replace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 12''' — Dross can locate bindings.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 13''' — Dross is a spirit that can simulate Soulsmithing projects.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 13''' — Lindon wants to use the Soulforge to fix Dross.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 14''' — Dross provides information to Lindon regarding the dream tablets.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 14''' — Dross informs Lindon that the environment lacks a way to replenish dream aura.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 16''' — Dross can link Lindon to constructs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 16''' — Dross can slow down the world.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 16''' — Dross suggests Reigan Shen is trying to preserve lives or the tridents.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 16''' — Dross pitted himself against the technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 17''' — Dross mentioned that Northstrider once used him to develop a combat report against Reigan Shen.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 17''' — Dross assessed that Eithan was denying an advancement to Sage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 17''' — Dross has evolved into a spirit of true power.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 17''' — Dross wears a tiny, spiked black crown.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 17''' — Dross's evolution cannot be reversed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 18''' — Dross claims the labyrinth fed upon Mercy's mother.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 19''' — Dross spoke to Lindon arrogantly.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 19''' — Dross cackled in Lindon's head.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 20''' — Dross has a shell.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 20''' — Dross can declare that an application of hunger madra is outside a person's understanding.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 20''' — Dross is an almighty mind-spirit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 21''' — Dross can help restore Lindon's strength.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 21''' — Dross can tear a hole in the world.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 22''' — Dross stated that Reigan Shen had slain the beast.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 22''' — Dross volunteered to be the first test subject for hunger binding.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 22''' — Dross states that the dead Dreadgod's information will support his purpose.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 23''' — Dross is a ball of dream madra at the base of Lindon's skull.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 23''' — Dross provided silent support to Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 23''' — Dross is mentioned in relation to time slowing.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 23''' — Dross provides combat solutions and reports to Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 25''' — Dross is a living construct of Lindon's making.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 25''' — Dross carries the burden of glorious knowledge.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 26''' — Dross is a spirit with a large eye.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 26''' — Dross is a construct that Eithan cannot repair unless it prevents further damage to the world.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 27''' — Lindon asks Dross to remember runes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 27''' — Dross wants to ascend.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 2''' — Dross was damaged by over-drafting himself for Lindon's sake.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 2''' — Dross has transformed into a new form.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 2''' — Dross's functions are beyond anything normally possible in Cradle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 2''' — Dross is an echo.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 2''' — Dross is a spirit that can inspect details of the labyrinth and remember them.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 2''' — Dross desires the dream madra of the Silent King.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 3''' — Dross is a dark, floating spirit with an unnerving voice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 3''' — Dross identifies himself as Dross.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 3''' — Dross can receive dream aura from Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 3''' — Dross is dark in color.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 3''' — Dross can manifest in the air.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 3''' — Dross whispers that Lindon is a man at war with an internal battlefield.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 3''' — Dross can examine the structure of Divine Treasures.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 3''' — Dross is a spirit that can project memories and echoes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 4''' — Dross is theorizing countermeasures against the Dreadgod's possession.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 4''' — Dross is a mind-construct.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 4''' — Dross is a dark-minded entity that Lindon has grown used to.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 5''' — Dross drifts out of the back of Lindon’s neck.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 5''' — Dross can explain images and shift attention to others.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 5''' — Dross has no fingers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 6''' — Dross can see that Lindon is spending time alone with Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 7''' — Dross is a character who spoke to Lindon about testing the barrier.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 8''' — Dross pilots Windfall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 8''' — Dross is paranoid.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 10''' — Dross has a current personality.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 12''' — Dross returned to the depths of Lindon's spirit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 12''' — Dross can drift and float.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 15''' — Dross simulates death and destruction permutations to find ways to avoid the Titan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 15''' — Dross is silent while witnessing the battle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 15''' — Dross is capable of clearing Lindon's memories in an instant.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 16''' — Dross stated that even he could not unravel the Silent King's lie or break his mirage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 16''' — Dross can materialize.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 17''' — Dross communicates with Kelsa through her mind.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 18''' — Dross has a dark-purple shape.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 18''' — Dross also feeds on excess dream aura.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 18''' — Dross is Lindon's companion and mind-spirit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 18''' — Dross can materialize and shines violet.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 18''' — Dross is present within the vision with Lindon and the Silent King.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 18''' — The Dreadgod shoved Dross aside.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 19''' — Dross helped prevent Lindon from collapsing while consuming the Silent King.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 19''' — Dross absorbed the dream aspects and memories from the Silent King.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 19''' — Dross wore a purple-white halo.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 19''' — Dross is in Lindon's spirit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 19''' — Dross has pebbly skin that is a light shade of purple.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 19''' — Dross can manifest a purple-white halo over his head.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 19''' — Dross whispered into Yerin's mind.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 19''' — Dross is aware of the physical effects on Lindon's eyes and arm.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 21''' — Dross can run simulations and cross-reference memories to build personality models.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 21''' — Dross states that Dreadgods have lived for thousands of years and are considered all but impossible to kill.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 21''' — Dross can create a thousand copies of himself to distort senses.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 21''' — Dross can point out other assignments in Everwood.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 22''' — Dross can manifest and wink.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 22''' — Dross complained while Lindon seized Remnants.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 23''' — Dross is Lindon's dream-spirit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 23''' — Dross can use dream madra to form illusory clones.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 23''' — Dross can dismantle techniques.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 23''' — Dross can show Lindon destinations.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 23''' — Dross can provide predictions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 23''' — Dross' madra can affect Lindon and Yerin simultaneously.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 24''' — Dross has returned.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 24''' — Dross spoke to Lindon while he was guiding a pocket world construct.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 2''' — Dross provides information about Mercy's madra channels.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 2''' — Dross notes that the items used are not simple constructs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 2''' — Dross can manifest next to Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 2''' — Dross was born in the world of Ghostwater.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 2''' — Dross wants to eat memories.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 3''' — Dross is a character who does not need to breathe.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 3''' — Dross spoke to Lindon in a strange manner.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 4''' — Dross is a character interacting with Lindon and Ziel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 4''' — Dross has a catalogue of memories from Soulsmiths ready for Lindon's consideration.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 5''' — Dross provides projections and commentary during the fight.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 6''' — Dross offered to chase the target via projection.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 7''' — Dross can taste thoughts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 7''' — Dross thinks Lindon is too much for the Array.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 7''' — Dross communicates with Lindon and Ziel via a void key.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 8''' — Dross helped Lindon find the Sword Sage's echo.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 8''' — Dross is watching Lindon take notes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 9''' — Dross commented that someone needs to take lessons from him on style.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 10''' — Dross is an entity that Orthos calls to halt the fight.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 10''' — Dross is a temporary copy left to operate illusion constructs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 10''' — Dross has a model of Eithan at Underlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 10''' — Dross may be responsible for Lindon's ability to use certain techniques.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 11''' — Dross may have benefited from the madra of the Silent King.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 11''' — Lindon was guided by Dross’ predictions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 11''' — Dross directed the oracle codex.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 12''' — Dross is a mind-spirit that was at its limit handling Lindon's memories.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 12''' — Dross exerted control over Northstrider's oracle codex.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 12''' — Dross used the Void Icon to hide from the Monarch.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 12''' — Dross is a limited copy of an original.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 12''' — Dross put information into Yerin's brain.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 13''' — Dross shouted that Yerin and Tiberian were still inside the portal.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 14''' — Lindon instructed Dross to move the labyrinth and feed its bindings with pieces of Subject One's body.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 15''' — Dross is unable to model the Weeping Dragon well.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 17''' — Dross noted that Northstrider has many memories.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 17''' — Dross can gasp with delight.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 17''' — Lindon instructs Blue to follow Dross's directions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 18''' — Dross is helping the newborn Sage and Herald hold on.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 18''' — Dross performs calculations.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 19''' — Dross was commanding Orthos and Little Blue.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 20''' — Dross is a copy of the original Dross.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 20''' — Dross can communicate with others and assist them in combat by being thrown as a spirit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 20''' — Dross inhabits Mercy's mind and senses after being slid into place.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 20''' — Dross's new spirit form is red.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 20''' — Dross is able to communicate with Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 20''' — Dross is not as powerful as he was in his original body.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 20''' — Dross is a smaller copy of his original self.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 21''' — Dross has become a mighty hive-mind consisting of multiple instances.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 21''' — Dross suggested Lindon take a break and do some Soulsmithing.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 23''' — Dross is a mind-spirit of unparalleled knowledge and cunning.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 23''' — Dross has multiple bodies.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 23''' — Dross tells Lindon that Northstrider is calculating his angle in the interaction.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 24''' — Dross suggests that if they kill Northstrider, Yerin should be the one to do it.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 24''' — Dross can simulate what Northstrider is seeing based on memories from an echo.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 24''' — Dross can perform impressions of others.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 24''' — Dross's eye can turn gold and he can sport a shaggy mane of hair.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 24''' — Dross is aboard Windfall with Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 25''' — Dross is Mercy's Dross.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 25''' — Dross can sense Lindon's presence.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 25''' — Dross is missing his original self.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 26''' — Dross can put people to sleep.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 26''' — Dross suggested using the strength of the Dragon Icon to help Mercy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 27''' — Dross can highlight entities in Lindon's vision.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 27''' — Dross suggested using Soul Cloak.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 27''' — Dross helps Lindon identify pinpoint timing.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 27''' — Dross sent mental attacks using a flood of dream aura.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 27''' — Dross showed Yerin how the phantom would move.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 27''' — There are five Drosses.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 27''' — Dross provides suggestions to Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 28''' — Dross communicates with Mercy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 28''' — Dross is an entity that can speak to Mercy and Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 29''' — Dross provides instructions to Yerin for scratching runes into stone.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 29''' — Dross can project a reflection of a person like a mirror.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 29''' — Dross is mentioned as part of the process to use the Queen's Gift.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 30''' — Dross reported on Reigan Shen.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 30''' — Dross can tap into the Crown of the Silent King to magnify mental assaults.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 32''' — Dross can send messages and create illusions of Ziel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 32''' — Dross can project a giant version of himself with a giant purple eye.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 36''' — Dross has run a sect before.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 36''' — Dross commented on the friendly natives.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 36''' — Dross can send language to others.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 36''' — Dross can increase Lindon's perception speed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 38''' — Dross informs Lindon they have about thirty seconds.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 4''' — Dross may influence the oracle codex.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 6''' — Dross is a companion to Mercy who can manifest.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 6''' — Dross is a character capable of communication with Mercy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 6''' — Dross receives and transmits information beamed by the Presence of the Wolves.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 6''' — Dross suggests there is an enemy involved.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 6''' — Dross can manifest on Mercy's shoulder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 6''' — Dross's connection to the Way has been reduced, lowering his predictive ability.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — Dross has spiked teeth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — Dross manifested himself wearing the pure-white halo of the Silent King.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — Dross reacts to Lindon's fall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — Dross can sense the meaning of a giant raven's caw but struggles to keep it from slipping through to Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — Dross can communicate with Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 8''' — Dross's voice provided a warning about the Herald threat.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 10''' — Dross is a combat Presence.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 10''' — Dross can reach out a tendril to pat someone on the shoulder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 11''' — Dross uses Silent King’s madra to project audible speech illusions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 11''' — Dross has a single purple eye and boneless arms.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 11''' — Dross has the power of memory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 11''' — Dross can read memories.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 11''' — Dross can manifest a white halo when using power.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 11''' — Dross is a character capable of using illusions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 11''' — Dross communicates via mental messages to Ziel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 11''' — Dross has learned to mimic human speech.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 11''' — Dross spies on Eternity facilities for Ziel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 11''' — Dross is a character who can create illusions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 11''' — Dross can lead the group to the laboratory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 11''' — Dross can ditch his veil to hold off G-42's consciousness.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 11''' — Dross warns that witnessing a human with great power can set locals on a bad fate.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 12''' — Dross accompanied Ziel on a mission.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 12''' — Dross is a Presence.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 12''' — Dross suggested showing who would win if Akura Malice and Northstrider fought.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 12''' — Dross is a red entity that checks Yerin's armor integrity.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 12''' — Lindon used one of Dross' soul-trapping geodes to create a crystalline castle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 12''' — Dross suggested the name Pulchritude.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 13''' — Dross had deactivated the versions of himself inside Lindon and Yerin at Lindon's request.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 14''' — Dross is a character that prods Lindon.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
